DECLARE @RollupId uniqueidentifier
DECLARE @CreatedOn datetime

DECLARE UPDATE_NEEDED_CURSOR CURSOR
	LOCAL FAST_FORWARD
FOR
	SELECT RollupPropertiesId FROM RollupPropertiesBase
	WHERE RollupEntityTypeCode = @etc
		AND (LastCalculationTime IS NULL
		OR LastCalculationTime < GETUTCDATE() - 1) -- -24hrs

OPEN UPDATE_NEEDED_CURSOR
FETCH NEXT FROM UPDATE_NEEDED_CURSOR INTO @RollupId
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
	SET @CreatedOn =
		ISNULL(
			(SELECT MIN(r.RecordCreatedOn) FROM Roll

DELETE TOP({0}) RJ FROM RollupJobBase AS RJ
	LEFT JOIN RollupPropertiesBase AS RP 
	ON RJ.RollupPropertiesId = RP.RollupPropertiesId
	WHERE (RP.RollupPropertiesId IS NULL OR RP.StatusCode = 2)
	SELECT @@ROWCOUNT

UPDATE AsyncOperationBase 
					SET PostponeUntil = @postPoneUntil,
					ModifiedOn = @modifiedOn,
					ModifiedBy = CreatedBy
					WHERE  AsyncOperationId = (SELECT RP.BootstrapRollupAsyncJobId FROM RollupPropertiesBase AS RP WHERE RP.RollupPropertiesId = @rollupId)
					AND RecurrencePattern IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
												RollupPropertiesId 
											FROM 
												RollupJobBase WITH (NOLOCK) 
											WHERE 
												StateCode = @initialState 
											GROUP BY 
												RollupPropertiesId 
											HAVING 
												COUNT(RollupJobId) >= @maxRollupJobCount

WHERE
[SourceEntityTypeCode] = @sourceEntityTypeCode
AND [StateCode] = @initialStateCode
AND [RetryCount] <= @maxRetryCount
AND EXISTS(
			SELECT 
				NULL 
			FROM 
				[RollupPropertiesBase] RP 
			WHERE 
				RP.RollupPropertiesId = RJ.RollupPropertiesId 
				AND RP.StateCode = @activeStateCode 
				AND RP.StatusCode = @activeStatusCode 
				AND RP.InitialValueCalculationStatus = @bootstrapCompleted
			)

	[RollupJobBase] 
SET

	[RetryCount] = CASE WHEN COALESCE([RetryCount], 0) > 0 THEN [RetryCount]-1 ELSE 0 END
WHERE 
	[RollupJobId] = @rollupJobId
